mapper.select: select fk.id, fk.name fee_key_name, fv.id, fv.name, fv.unit, fv.fee_key_id from fee_key fk join lease.fee_value fv on fk.id = fv.fee_key_id where fk.is_deleted = 0 and fv.is_deleted = 0 and fk.id in (select fee_key_id from apartment_fee_value where apartment_fee_value.is_deleted = 0 and apartment_id = #{id})
